theme: Small talk đầu giờ & pantry chat

vocab.example_vi: Cuối tuần của bạn thế nào, Linh?

vocab.meaning_vi: đi lại (từ nhà đến công ty)
vocab.example: My commute takes about thirty minutes by motorbike.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đi lại từ nhà đến công ty mất khoảng ba mươi phút bằng xe máy.

vocab.meaning_vi: giờ nghỉ giải lao uống cà phê
vocab.example: Let's take a coffee break before the next meeting.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta nghỉ giải lao uống cà phê trước cuộc họp tiếp theo nhé.

vocab.example: The traffic this morning was terrible.
vocab.example_vi: Giao thông sáng nay tệ quá.

vocab.example: I'm exhausted after working late last night.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi kiệt sức sau khi làm việc muộn tối qua.

vocab.example: Do you have time for a quick chat in the pantry?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thời gian trò chuyện nhanh ở pantry không?

vocab.example: Can you recommend a good coffee shop near the office?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn gợi ý cho tôi một quán cà phê ngon gần công ty được không?

vocab.meaning_vi: cập nhật/trò chuyện lại sau một thời gian
vocab.example: Let's catch up over lunch sometime this week.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau ăn trưa để nói chuyện tuần này nhé.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Good morning, Minh. How was your weekend?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: It was great, thanks. I went hiking with my friends. What about you?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: I just stayed home and rested. My commute is long, so I needed the break.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: I understand. The traffic this morning was terrible too.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Yeah, I feel exhausted already. Do you want a coffee break before the meeting?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Sure. Can you recommend a good coffee shop near the office?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: There's a new one downstairs. The coffee is really nice.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Let's go there. We can catch up on the weekend properly.

questions.q: What did Minh do over the weekend?

options: Her commute is long and traffic was bad

questions.q: Where does Linh recommend for coffee?

shadowing: My commute is long, so I needed the break.
The traffic this morning was terrible.
Can you recommend a good coffee shop near the office?
Let's catch up on the weekend properly.

interview.question: How do you build good relationships with your coworkers?
tips_vi: Nêu hành động cụ thể: chào hỏi, hỏi thăm, giúp đỡ đồng nghiệp
Nhấn mạnh tôn trọng sự khác biệt văn hoá nếu làm việc với người nước ngoài
Kết nối với lợi ích cho công việc nhóm
interview.sample_answer: I try to be friendly and open with my coworkers every day. I usually say good morning and ask how their day is going, especially during coffee breaks. I also like to listen when someone shares a problem, and I offer help if I can. I think small talk is important because it helps build trust before we discuss serious work topics. When people feel comfortable with each other, teamwork becomes much easier and more enjoyable.

interview.question: How do you handle a busy schedule and avoid feeling exhausted at work?
tips_vi: Nêu cách quản lý thời gian: ưu tiên công việc, nghỉ giải lao ngắn
Có thể nhắc đến cân bằng công việc – cuộc sống
Tránh trả lời chung chung, nên có ví dụ cụ thể
interview.sample_answer: I try to plan my day the night before, so I know my top priorities. During the day, I take short coffee breaks to rest my mind, especially after a long meeting. I also try not to check messages after work hours, so I can really relax at home. On weekends, I like to do outdoor activities like hiking. This helps me feel fresh and ready for the new week instead of feeling exhausted all the time.
